revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{High-use}} {{tsh|Cvt}} {{Documentation subpage}}
This template is identical to {{tl|convert}}, except this has the option {{para|abbr|on}} preset. See [[Template:Convert]] for further documentation.
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| [[Category:Template Convert| ]] [[Category:Conversion templates]] [[Category:Numbers as words conversion templates]] [[Category:Sorting templates]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23177433986|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{High-use}} {{tsh|Cvt}} {{Documentation subpage}}
This template is identical to {{tl|convert}}, except this has the option {{para|abbr|on}} preset. See [[Template:Convert]] for further documentation.
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Template Convert| ]] [[Category:Conversion templates]] [[Category:Numbers as words conversion templates]] [[Category:Sorting templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Convert_abbreviated%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Convert_abbreviated%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{High-use}} {{tsh|Cvt}} {{Documentation subpage}}
This template is identical to {{tl|convert}}, except this has the option {{para|abbr|on}} preset. See [[Template:Convert]] for further documentation.
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Template Convert| ]] [[Category:Conversion templates]] [[Category:Numbers as words conversion templates]] [[Category:Sorting templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
